_comment: Default exec allowlist for cookclaw agents. Deployed to ~/.openclaw/exec-approvals.json by bootstrap.sh ONLY if not already present (never overwrites owner edits). To add a command, append to allowlist; to restrict args on an allowed command, add argPattern as a regex. See https://docs.openclaw.ai/tools/exec-approvals for full schema. version=1 is required.

_tiers.read-only: Filesystem inspection, no mutation. cat ls grep rg find head tail wc sort uniq tr cut diff jq lsof ps date echo node
_tiers.write-local: Creates files/dirs in workspace; no network, no privilege. mkdir touch tee. sed/awk restricted to non-in-place via argPattern.
_tiers.network-out: curl restricted to localhost (MC), Telegram API, OpenClaw control plane, Tailscale internal. gh restricted to read-only subcommands. Arbitrary hosts/mutating subcommands fall through to ask.
_tiers.vcs: git split into two argPatterns: read-only inspection and local-mutating (add/commit/stash/checkout-non-revert). push, reset --hard, clean -fd, branch -D, checkout -- fall through to ask.
_tiers.package-install: brew/npm/pnpm read-only subcommands auto. install/uninstall/update fall through to ask.
_tiers.framework: openclaw/taskflow/obsidian-cli/peekaboo/clawhub/mcporter. openclaw mutating subcommands (configure/update/doctor without --check) fall through to ask because they resolve SecretRefs to plaintext in ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json (issue #9627).
_tiers.mutating-shared-REMOVED: rsync removed from auto-allowlist entirely. Any rsync invocation falls through to ask so the owner sees source+dest before bulk copy.

allowlist.argPattern: ^(auth status|api|repo view|issue view|issue list|pr view|pr list|pr diff|pr checks|run list|run view|workflow list)\b
